description: Sorts a SAM or BAM file in a specified order
author: GenePattern
plan:
## Picard.SortSam GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Picard.SortSam is a GenePattern module that Sorts a SAM or BAM file in a specified order

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: input.file, sort.order, output.format, output.prefix
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>SortSam.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-io-1.4.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-cli-1.2.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-lang-2.5.jar<path.separator><libdir>SortSamWrapper.jar SortSamWrapper -i <input.file> -s <sort.order> -o <output.prefix>.sorted.<output.format>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.file
parameters.description: Input file in SAM or BAM format

parameters.name: output.format
parameters.description: Whether the file output format should be SAM or BAM

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: prefix for the name of output file
